title: IssuedCredential
description: Lifecycle record for an issued credential. Stores metadata without raw credential data (only a SHA-256 hash for integrity). Links FlowExecution to credential status, status list entries, and revocation history.

credential_id.description: Globally unique credential identifier, e.g. urn:uuid:... or issuer-defined URI

application_id.description: Source application if issued via application_approval_issuance flow

revocation_profile_id.description: RevocationProfile governing revocation check mode and caching for this credential.

subject_id.description: DID, device key, or holder identifier

subject_claims_hash.description: Privacy-preserving SHA-256 hash of subject claims payload (for audit without revealing PII)

status_list_entries.description: References to status list entries (bitstring or token status list)

credential_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the issued credential for audit trail

revocation_reason.description: Reason for revocation; see revocation-reasons enum
